name: Sceanrio 1: search Stockholm hotels on Booking.com with dynamic dates

steps.name: Expect "toBeVisible" getByPlaceholder(/where are you going/i).or(getByLabel(/where are you going/i)).or(locator('input[name="ss"]')).first()
